prose.$description: Optimal reading width for body text

narrow.$description: Narrow content for captions and asides

actionMinHeight.$description: Minimum touch-target height for default action density (medium buttons, inputs, selects). 36px is the WCAG 2.2 target size.

actionMinHeightSmall.$description: Minimum touch-target height for compact controls (small button variant). Below WCAG 2.2 — intended for high-density contexts where users have other affordances.

actionMinHeightLarge.$description: Minimum touch-target height for prominent controls (large button variant). Comfortable above 44px iOS / 48px Material guideline.

0.$description: Flat — no elevation. Resting on the page plane.

1.$description: Subtle resting lift — cards, list rows. Ambient + key two-layer shadow.

2.$description: Raised lift — hovered cards, sticky bars. Ambient + key two-layer shadow.

3.$description: Floating lift — dropdowns, popovers, tooltips. Ambient + key two-layer shadow.

4.$description: High lift — sheets, side panels. Ambient + key two-layer shadow.

5.$description: Maximum lift — modal dialogs over the scrim. Ambient + key two-layer shadow.

ringOffset.$description: Space between element and focus ring

aboveDropdown.$description: One layer above dropdowns, below overlay

component.$description: Component-level z-index for overlays within a layout

medium0.$description: Pre-long - common transition speed between medium and long

long0.$description: Post-long - common transition speed between long and long1

long1.$description: Extra long - indeterminate loaders, complex entrance sequences

short.$description: Short presence budget — auto-dismissing surfaces with terse content

medium.$description: Default presence budget for auto-dismissing surfaces (toasts)

long.$description: Long presence budget — surfaces carrying actions or longer copy

enter.$description: Quick enter - sharp start, smooth end

exit.$description: Quick exit - smooth start, sharp end

slow.$description: Slow stagger — between sm and md, for deliberate sequencing

small.$description: Named alias for shape.radius.02 (4px). Retained at core tier so contracts referencing core.shape.radius.small resolve. semantic.shape.radius.small is the canonical semantic alias and uses the same value.

large.$description: Named alias for shape.radius.04 (16px). Retained at core tier so contracts referencing core.shape.radius.large resolve. semantic.shape.radius.large is the canonical semantic alias and uses the same value.

inter.$value: "Inter", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

height.$description: Action (button-like) small height — 28px at default density.

min-height.$description: Action small min-height; matches height so content cannot collapse the control.

min-width.$description: Action small min-width; square minimum so icon-only buttons stay tappable.

height.$description: Action medium height — 36px at default density. Default size for action components.
Action large height — 48px at default density.

accent.$description: Accent background color. Kept at red.500 in dark mode (not red.400) so white on-color text clears WCAG AA (4.68:1 vs 3.09:1).

softer.$description: Softer danger background — the lightest intent wash (palette .50/.900). For large-area surfaces (full-width alert/toast banners) where .subtle reads too strong. on-danger-subtle text clears AA on it (~7.8:1).

elevated.$description: Elevated background color for cards and modals

onColor.$description: Background color for elements on colored backgrounds

softer.$description: Softer info background — lightest intent wash (palette .50/.900) for large-area surfaces. on-info-subtle text clears AA (~7.8:1).
Softer success background — lightest intent wash (palette .50/.900) for large-area surfaces. on-success-subtle text clears AA (~7.7:1).
Softer warning background — lightest intent wash (palette .50/.900) for large-area surfaces. on-warning-subtle text clears AA (~7.8:1).

disabled.$description: Disabled state background color. light=neutral.100, dark=neutral.800 (widened one stop from 200/700) so disabled foreground (neutral.500/400) keeps AA_LARGE 3:1 against it under the contrast-targeted 10-stop ramp.

transparent.$description: Fully transparent background — used for items that show only on hover/current state (NavList default, ghost buttons).

subtle.$description: Subtle background tint — used for hover states on otherwise-transparent surfaces (NavList item hover).

accentSubtle.$description: Subtle accent tint — used to mark current/selected items on otherwise-transparent surfaces (NavList current item).

onColor.$description: Border color for elements on colored backgrounds

brand.$description: Foreground color for text on brand backgrounds

subtle.$description: Foreground color on subtle danger backgrounds
Foreground color on subtle info backgrounds
Foreground color on subtle success backgrounds
Foreground color on subtle warning backgrounds

onColor.$description: Foreground color for text on saturated colored/accent fills. Fixed white in both themes (not theme-primary text) so it clears WCAG AA on accent/strong backgrounds (4.68:1 on red.500). Mirrors foreground.on.brand.

disabled.$description: Disabled foreground color. Bumped from neutral.300/500 to neutral.500/400 to meet 3:1 against background.disabled (neutral.200/700). WCAG SC 1.4.3 exempts disabled controls from contrast minimums, but unreadable disabled labels are usability debt — this satisfies AA_LARGE (3:1) so disabled state stays visibly de-emphasized without becoming invisible.

inverse.$description: Inverse foreground color — the label color used INSIDE colored action surfaces (primary/danger buttons). The colored surface keeps its hue across light and dark themes, so the inverse label stays light in both. NOT the inverse of foreground.primary — use color.mode.dark/light directly for that.

scrim.$description: Default overlay scrim (medium weight, 40% black). Used by Dialog and other surfaces that need a single canonical scrim. Weighted variants live as siblings.

scrimMedium.$description: Medium overlay scrim (canonical default — same value as bare 'scrim')

large.$description: Large tap target size for better accessibility

gap.$description: Display inter-child gap. Display components (Text with inline glyph, Chip with icon, Stat label-and-value, etc.) often arrange a small set of inline children with light spacing between them. Used by `box-model.gap` on display-category components.

none.$description: No elevation — explicitly removes any box-shadow

flat.$description: No elevation — flush with the page plane.

floating.$description: Hovered / sticky surface — raised above siblings.

overlay.$description: Anchored floating surface — dropdowns, menus, tooltips.

dialog.$description: Top-most surface over the scrim — modal dialogs.

padding-block.$description: Feedback vertical padding. Feedback components (Alert, AlertNotice, Banner, Status, Progress, Skeleton) carry padding so they read as a distinct surface in flow.

padding-inline.$description: Feedback horizontal padding. Symmetric with padding-block.

gap.$description: Feedback inter-child gap — icon ↔ message ↔ action.

width.$description: Focus ring thickness — references core interaction primitive.

offset.$description: Distance between focused element and ring.

color.$description: Focus ring color — references theme-aware semantic border-focus so dark/light themes invert correctly.

style.$description: Focus ring stroke style. Constant across themes.

extent.$description: Glyph small extent — 12px. Used for small icons, status dots, dense badges. Glyphs are square; extent is both width and height.
Glyph medium extent — 16px. Default size for icons, avatars, badges.

height.$description: Input small height — matches action.size.small.height for visual alignment when inputs and buttons sit on the same row.

gap.$description: Input small gap between label/control/help-text when stacked, or adornment ↔ control when inline.

height.$description: Input medium height — default size for form inputs.

opacity.$description: Semantic alias for the disabled-state opacity. Resolves to the core interaction.disabled.opacity primitive (0.5). Contracts reference this semantic path; core path is the underlying primitive.

hover.$description: State-layer opacity for hover — a tonal overlay (currentColor at this alpha) laid over a surface, rather than a hardcoded second color. Material-style 4%.

selected.$description: State-layer opacity for selected / focus-visible tonal overlay. 8%.

pressed.$description: State-layer opacity for pressed / active tonal overlay. 12%.

dragged.$description: State-layer opacity for dragged tonal overlay. 16%.

notification.$description: Presence budget for auto-dismissing notifications (Toast). Consumed by the behavior layer (auto-dismiss timers), not by CSS.

enter.$description: Icon initial scale when entering (grows to full size)

exit.$description: Icon final scale when exiting (shrinks from full size)

scale.$description: Subtle scale down for press feedback

mode.$description: Active spacing density mode (tight, compact, default, spacious)

xs.$description: Semantic alias for the compact-density xs spacing primitive.

sm.$description: Semantic alias for the compact-density sm spacing primitive (8px). Contracts (Field.field.gap.y, Field.field.pad.x.sm) reference this semantic path; core path is the underlying primitive.

md.$description: Semantic alias for the compact-density md spacing primitive (12px). Contracts (Field.field.pad.x) reference this semantic path; core path is the underlying primitive.

grid.$description: Grid gap - maps to density mode

gridLarge.$description: Large grid gap - maps to density mode

gridMedium.$description: Medium grid gap - maps to density mode

gridSmall.$description: Small grid gap - maps to density mode

component.$description: Component gap - maps to density mode

section.$description: Section gap - maps to density mode

stack.$description: Stack gap (vertical spacing) - maps to density mode

component.$description: Component margin - maps to density mode

section.$description: Section margin - maps to density mode

container.$description: Container padding - maps to density mode

card.$description: Card padding - maps to density mode

component.$description: Component padding - maps to density mode

section.$description: Section padding - maps to density mode

page.$description: Page padding - maps to density mode

gap.$description: Structure inter-cell/inter-item gap. Used by Table, Tabs, Accordion, NavList, List, Breadcrumbs — components that arrange a collection of children and let each child carry its own padding rather than the structural root carrying it.

padding-block.$description: Surface vertical padding. Surfaces (Card, Sheet, Dialog, Popover, Tooltip, Postcard, Toast) carry their own padding on the root; descendants do not. Density mode shifts spacing.padding.card.

padding-inline.$description: Surface horizontal padding. Symmetric with padding-block by default.

gap.$description: Surface inter-region gap — the vertical rhythm between header / body / footer regions when the surface is a vertical stack.

min-width.$description: Surface minimum width — prevents the surface from collapsing to icon-width when content is sparse.

family.$value: "Inter", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif
"Inter", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

italic.$description: Italic font style for emphasis, quotes, and decorative text

family.$value: "Inter", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif
"Inter", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

heading.$value: "Inter", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

body.$value: "Inter", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif
